steps.title: Spot the singular antecedent
steps.content: The blank needs a subject pronoun for the main clause. That pronoun must refer back to “a given term,” which is singular.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content:
Pronoun-antecedent agreement requires it as the standard singular pronoun, making B the correct answer.

C and D violate agreement by using plural pronouns; A uses the demonstrative this when the personal pronoun it is conventional.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
